description:
The DebugInteractable component is a UIX interactable that changes the color of an image on the same slot when the component area is interacted with.

This was possibly made by Frooxius while they were creating UIX during the UIX development of FrooxEngine.

fields.TouchExitLock: Whether the component can have an exit event or not when touching the component is stopped.
fields.TouchEnterLock: Whether the component can have an enter event or not when touching the component is started.

usage: Attach to a slot of a UIX with an Image component to start debugging via touch.
